title: MariaDB Streaming Pipeline
description: MariaDB-specific streaming workflow including charset registry initialization and full connector lifecycle

activity_phases.label: ConnectorTask PreStart
steps: MariaDbConnectorTask.preStart(config) called by Kafka Connect runtime

activity_phases.label: Task Start — Infrastructure Setup
steps: start(configuration): build DB config with responseBuffering=adaptive, fetchSize=10000

activity_phases.label: Charset Registry Initialization (Service Provider)
steps: ObjectMapper.readValue(stream, CharacterSetMappings.class) → parse JSON into CharacterSetMappings
loadCollationMappings(collations): populate collationIndexToCollationName list + collationIndexToCharacterSet map
[BRANCH] encoding resolution: Charset.forName(encoding) → add canonical name + aliases; if unknown && mblen==1 → add raw encoding; if empty → fallback UTF-8 (mblen>1) or Cp1252

activity_phases.label: Schema & Bean Registration
steps: MariaDbValueConverters created with decimal/temporal/binary modes + serviceRegistry
new MariaDbDatabaseSchema(connectorConfig, valueConverters, topicNamingStrategy, schemaNameAdjuster, tableIdCaseInsensitive, converterRegistry, taskContext)
BeanRegistry: register config, connectorConfig, schema, jdbcConnection, valueConverters, offsets, taskContext

activity_phases.label: Pre-Streaming Validation
steps: [BRANCH] validateSnapshotFeasibility: if binlog pos unavailable → previousOffsets.resetOffset()
Reconnect: connection.execute('SELECT 1'); on failure → connection.close() + connectionFactory.mainConnection()

activity_phases.label: Pipeline Component Assembly
steps: Build ChangeEventQueue<DataChangeEvent> with pollInterval, maxBatchSize, maxQueueSize, buffering
new EventDispatcher<>(connectorConfig, topicNamingStrategy, schema, queue, dataCollectionFilter, ...)
new MariaDbChangeEventSourceFactory(config, connectionFactory, errorHandler, dispatcher, clock, schema, taskContext, streamingMetrics, queue, snapshotterService, binaryLogClient)

activity_phases.label: Coordinator Start
steps: new ChangeEventSourceCoordinator<>(previousOffsets, errorHandler, MariaDbConnector.class, connectorConfig, changeEventSourceFactory, metricsFactory, dispatcher, schema, signalProcessor, notificationService, snapshotterService)

activity_phases.label: Streaming Execution (BinlogStreamingChangeEventSource.execute)
steps: Register event handlers: STOP, HEARTBEAT, INCIDENT, ROTATE, TABLE_MAP, QUERY, TRANSACTION_PAYLOAD
[BRANCH] bufferSize==0 → direct listener; else → EventBuffer listener

activity_phases.label: GTID / Position Setup
steps: [BRANCH] filteredGtidSet not null → client.setGtidSet(filtered); initializeGtidSet(filtered) → new MariadbGtidSet(value)
[BRANCH] filteredGtidSet null + purged empty → client.setGtidSet(''); initializeGtidSet('')
[BRANCH] filteredGtidSet null + purged non-empty → client.setGtidSet(purged); initializeGtidSet('')

activity_phases.label: Streaming Event Loop
steps: BinaryLogClient connects to MariaDB, starts reading binlog events
Each event → handleEvent(partition, offsetContext, context, event) dispatches to registered handler

MARIADB_GTID event → handleGtidEvent: construct GTID string (domainId-serverId-sequence), gtidSet.add(gtid), offsetContext.startGtid(), optionally setIgnoreDmlEventByGtidSource, handleTransactionBegin
ANNOTATE_ROWS event → handleRecordingQuery: extract query; [BRANCH] if signal table query → skip; else offsetContext.setQuery(query)
QUERY event → handleQueryEvent (DDL processing, schema changes)

key_components: MariaDbCharsetRegistry.MAP_SIZE = 1024; data structures: collationIndexToCollationName (List), collationIndexToCharacterSet (TreeMap), characterSetNameToCharacterSet (HashMap)
key_decisions: isSqlQueryIncluded → enable ANNOTATE_ROWS (MariaDB-specific, equivalent to MySQL ROWS_QUERY)
isGtidModeEnabled && shouldRecoverUsingGtid → GTID-based vs binlog-file-position recovery
filteredGtidSet present/absent + purgedGtidSet present/absent → determines client GTID start point
signalingDataCollectionIds empty → no incremental snapshot source created
bufferSize == 0 → direct event handling; else → buffered via EventBuffer
MariaDB GTID format: {domainId}-{serverId}-{sequence} (constructed manually from GTID_EVENT header + payload)
important_notes: MariaDB uses ANNOTATE_ROWS instead of MySQL's ROWS_QUERY. GTID format differs (domain-server-seq). MariaDB slave capability 4 set via configureReplicaCompatibility. charset_mappings.json loaded at startup via Jackson. Collation index range 0-1023 (MAP_SIZE=1024). SSL modes: DISABLE→DISABLED, TRUST→REQUIRED, VERIFY_CA→VERIFY_CA, VERIFY_FULL→VERIFY_IDENTITY.
